name: molecule/features-list
title: Features List
description: An interactive features accordion with image switcher — showcase your key selling points with animated image transitions.

default.title: Third-Party Tested
default.description: Every batch of our peptides undergoes independent laboratory testing to verify identity, purity, and composition. We provide full Certificates of Analysis (CoA) for complete transparency.
default.imageAlt: Scientist preparing samples in the lab

default.title: USA-Shipped & Fast Delivery
default.description: We ship directly from our U.S. facility, ensuring fast delivery times and eliminating customs clearance delays. Professional packaging and tracking updates ensure your research materials arrive safely and on time.

default.title: Research-Grade Quality
default.description: All products are strictly intended for laboratory research use only. We understand the critical importance of purity and reliability in research applications, ensuring every product meets rigorous quality standards.
